name: Quad/Graphics, Inc.
business: Quad is a marketing experience company providing integrated marketing services including creative, production, media, data intelligence, and technology solutions through its MX Solutions Suite. It also operates one of the largest commercial printing platforms in North America. The company serves approximately 2,100 clients, primarily in commerce (retail, consumer packaged goods, direct-to-consumer), financial services, and health.

exposures.sentence: Regarding client-facing solutions, Quad has infused AI across its MX Solutions Suite to optimize each aspect of the marketing process.
Quad continues to invest in the rapidly evolving technology of artificial intelligence to realize internal cost savings and support new forms of revenue generation.

Rapid changes in technology affecting the marketing and advertising industry, including developments in artificial intelligence, may adversely affect the Company, and if the Company is unable to adapt its market offerings to effectively compete in this technology-driven environment, the Company's ability to grow will be adversely affected.
Quad possesses a proprietary, household-based data stack that represents approximately 97% of the U.S. adult population and 92% of U.S. households.
advanced equipment and automation, including automated storage and retrieval systems and robotic guided vehicles and palletizers that support high-quality, low-cost production.

Quad is a leading mailer with the United States Postal Service (USPS), mailing approximately 5.4 billion pieces of marketing materials annually, which represents approximately 9.1% of the USPS yearly marketing mail and periodical volume.

Quad has expanded this expertise by creating its own in-store retail media network (RMN), which leverages the high foot traffic of brick-and-mortar stores to generate direct consumer connections, placing digital technology within the in-store environment.
The Company and its clients are subject to various United States and foreign cybersecurity laws, which require the Company to maintain adequate protections for electronically held information.

catalysts.sentence: the acquisition of the Enru co-mail assets, which were acquired on April 1, 2025.
the European operations were sold on February 28, 2025.

catalysts.event: USPS Marketing Mail Catalog promotion effective period
catalysts.sentence: The USPS launched a new Marketing Mail Catalog promotion, which offers a 10% discount on postage for any mail pieces that meet the USPS definition of a catalog. The discount went into effect on October 1, 2025 and continues until June 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: PRC final rule restricting USPS to one price change a year from 2026 to 2030
catalysts.sentence: the PRC issued a final rule that restricts the USPS to one price change a year from 2026 to 2030.

catalysts.event: Tenth amendment to Senior Secured Credit Facility
catalysts.sentence: The Company completed the tenth amendment to its Senior Secured Credit Facility on August 20, 2025.
